acceptance_criteria.description: All TypeScript types compile without errors
JSON Schemas match the canonical schemas from docs/03-atomic-task-schema.md and TypeScript types are consistent with JSON Schema definitions
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) task.schema.json matches the AtomicTaskDefinition schema from docs/03-atomic-task-schema.md including the oneOf discriminator for AcceptanceCriterion with all four criterion types (test, build, lint, review). (2) execution-record.schema.json matches the ExecutionRecord schema from docs/03-atomic-task-schema.md including CriterionResult definition. (3) definitions.ts exports TaskDefinition, AcceptanceCriterion (discriminated union on type field), ExecutionRecord, and CriterionResult interfaces that mirror the JSON Schema structures. (4) AcceptanceCriterion uses a TypeScript discriminated union with test/build/lint having verify field and review having rubric field. PASS if all four hold. FAIL if any divergence.

acceptance_criteria.description: Naming conventions and patterns follow impl-7e2a9f1b and impl-3c8d5e0a established patterns
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) File names are kebab-case. (2) Interfaces/types are PascalCase. (3) The definitions.ts file adds to existing SpecDefinition and ImplDefinition types without modifying them. (4) JSON Schema files use Draft-07 ($schema field). (5) scope object has required files and modules arrays. PASS if all conventions match. FAIL if any deviation.
